mapper.insert: insert into agent_exec_attachment (id, exec_history_id, exec_log_id, file_id, file_name, step_num, create_time, create_user) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{execHistoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{execLogId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select * from agent_exec_attachment where exec_history_id = #{execHistoryId} order by step_num asc, create_time asc
select * from agent_exec_attachment where exec_log_id = #{execLogId} order by step_num asc, create_time asc
select * from agent_exec_attachment where id = #{id} limit 1
